name: ba-hub-unified
description: BA Hub - Broken Arrow Stats Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w database"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w database && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w backend && npm run type-check -w frontend && npm run type-check -w shared && npm run type-check -w database
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.dev:setup: npm run dev:db && timeout /t 3 && npm run dev:migrate
